modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to create a user account for Scala Content Manager.

full_description_text:  
The user is requesting the establishment of a new account.  
This account should include a login and password for access.  
The request pertains specifically to the Scala Enterprise Content Manager environment.  
The user requires this setup to utilize the functionalities of the content management system effectively.
